urdu transliteration text: TUKDE HO MERE QAASIME NAASHAAD KAA LAASHAA
english translation text: Trampled to pieces be my youthful Qasim's body

urdu transliteration text: JAL JAAE MERE ASGHARE MAASUM KAA JULAA
english translation text: Burnt to ashes be the cradle of my innocent Asghar

urdu transliteration text:
REH-JAAE MERI ZAINABE DILGIR KAA PARDAA
If only my broken hearted Zainab's veil is spared
HAMSHIR KAA PARDAA MERI DILGIR KA PARDAA
english translation text: The veil of my sister, the veil of the heartbroken
